title: microlicia monticola
intro: Microlicia monticola is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the mountain melastome. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Microlicia monticola are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory infections, among other uses. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and are often used to treat a range of health conditions, including skin infections and wounds.
